description: Phase 20 scan_engine_hash: sha256(tool/_n6_lib) must match the stamp in config/engine_manifest.json at engine.source_hash. Mismatch means either (a) the engine was intentionally modified and the author must rotate the stamp before commit, or (b) tamper-evidence — investigate the diff. Rotation ceremony forces a conscious ack on every engine change.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_engine_hash.json ] && jq -r "if .matches == true then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_engine_hash.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
